hypotheses.support: The author expresses optimism that AI will benefit workers, jobs, or society.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses concern that AI will harm workers, jobs, or society.

hypotheses.support: The author argues that social media platforms should face stronger regulation, restrictions, bans, or accountability.
hypotheses.oppose: The author argues against stronger regulation, restrictions, bans, or government control of social media platforms.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses admiration, approval, or support for Elon Musk or his companies.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses criticism, distrust, frustration, or contempt toward Elon Musk or his companies.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses support or approval for building more data centers and AI infrastructure.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses concern, criticism, or opposition toward data center expansion.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses trust, approval, or optimism toward OpenAI or Anthropic.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses distrust, skepticism, criticism, or concern toward OpenAI or Anthropic.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses approval, satisfaction, or optimism about Google or Gemini AI.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses criticism, frustration, or skepticism toward Google or Gemini AI.

hypotheses.support: The author supports US restrictions on AI chip exports to China or sees them as necessary.
hypotheses.oppose: The author criticizes or questions US restrictions on AI chip exports to China.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses approval or satisfaction with Microsoft or Windows.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses frustration, distrust, criticism, or dissatisfaction with Microsoft or Windows.

hypotheses.support: The author supports platform moderation, app store enforcement, or removing harmful content.
hypotheses.oppose: The author criticizes platform moderation, app store enforcement, censorship, or platform control.

hypotheses.support: The author expresses excitement, approval, or optimism about Meta's smart glasses, AR products, or wearable AI.
hypotheses.oppose: The author expresses skepticism, criticism, privacy concern, or distrust toward Meta's smart glasses, AR products, or wearable AI.
